title: Changes have been made to the surveillance practice in toys
bodyHtml:
An amendment has been made to the Communiqué numbered 2019/6 regarding the application of value-based surveillance in toys. According to the amendment, surveillance will not be applied to the import of "sound and movement mechanisms used in toy production and classified in GTP 95.03, electronic cards regardless of their shape and processed engine parts and components".

The change came into effect as of 26th September.

Click here for the Communiqué on Amendments to the Communiqué on the Implementation of Surveillance in Imports (Communiqué No: 2019/6).
